headline: Should You Buy, Hold or Sell Astronics Stock Ahead of Q1 Earnings?
summary: ATRO heads into Q1 earnings with strong aerospace demand, margin expansion and a 157.2% stock surge over the past year.

headline: AVAV Slides 28.4% in 3 Months: Buy, Hold or Take Profits?
summary: AeroVironment shares decline 28.4% in three months, but a $1.1 billion backlog, $2.1 billion bookings and an ESAero deal bolster its long-term growth.
